## Checklist

- [ ] Appearance stays config-driven (`PCC_*` in `config.example.sh` / `render.py`) — no hard-coded values
- [ ] No personal data (usernames, hostnames, home paths, emails) in committed files
- [ ] Tested locally by piping sample JSON into `statusline.sh`
- [ ] PR is focused on a single change
